info.title: Holodeck Router UI API
info.description: REST API for managing VCF 9 Holodeck deployments, Day 2 operations, reservations, commands, user management, and email notifications.

tags.name: Holodeck Configs
tags.description: Holodeck deployment configurations synced from the holorouter

tags.name: Instances
tags.description: Unified view of configs and deployment state

tags.name: Depot
tags.description: Offline depot binary management via VCF Download Tool

cookieAuth.name: holodeck-token
cookieAuth.description: JWT token set as httpOnly cookie after login

logFile.description: Path to saved tmux output log (set on completion)

get.description: Returns infrastructure connectivity settings. Sensitive values are masked. Superadmin only.
Returns ui_* config keys. Public (no auth required).

post.description: Tests connectivity to the configured holorouter. Superadmin only.
Tests connectivity to the offline depot appliance. Superadmin only.
Tests HTTP/HTTPS connectivity to the offline depot appliance using the configured protocol, IP, port, and optional Basic auth credentials. Superadmin only.
Sends a test email to verify the configured email provider (SMTP or Resend). Superadmin only.

get.description: Finds confirmed reservations starting within 5 minutes that haven't been reminded yet, sends reminder emails to users with email addresses, and marks them as sent. Called automatically every minute by the server. Optionally protected by CRON_SECRET bearer token.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer token matching CRON_SECRET env var (if set)

get.description: Returns version, git SHA, hostname, uptime, etc. Superadmin only.
Returns all HoloDeck configs synced from the holorouter with local metadata and parsed summary data from cached JSON.

post.description: Runs New-HoloDeckConfig on the holorouter via SSH. Creates a new configuration file from the default template with target host credentials, then imports and caches it locally. labadmin+ only.

put.description: Update local description/notes for a config. labadmin+ only.

post.description: Fetches all configs from the holorouter via Get-HoloDeckConfig and Import-HoloDeckConfig, then updates the local DB cache. Any authenticated user can trigger this.
Tests ESX/vCenter credentials by running Connect-VIServer from VMware PowerCLI on the holorouter via SSH. Connects and immediately disconnects. labadmin+ only.

get.description: Returns all configs with pre-computed capabilities from the local DB cache. No SSH calls — instant response. Includes a 'stale' flag when cache is older than 5 minutes.

stale.description: True if cache is >5 min old or empty

get.description: Returns full config details including parsed deployment settings from cached JSON. Superadmins also get the raw JSON.

put.description: Update description and notes. labadmin+ only.

delete.description: Removes the config JSON file from the holorouter and deletes the local cache entry. Refuses to delete configs with running instances. labadmin+ only.

409.description: Config has a running instance — remove instance first

post.summary: Query VMware inventory from target host
post.description: Connects to the config's target vCenter/ESXi host using stored credentials and queries available datastores, networks, clusters, and datacenters via PowerCLI. labadmin+ only.

400.description: Config missing credentials or target host

delete.description: Soft-disables the user account. Superadmin only.

post.description: Creates a time slot. Returns overlap warning (409) if conflicts exist — resend with confirmOverlap: true to proceed.

confirmOverlap.description: Set true to bypass overlap warning

get.summary: Get active reservation and maintenance window

get.description: Returns enabled commands the user's role can access. Superadmins can pass ?all=true to include disabled commands (for the admin management page).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: If 'true' and user is superadmin, returns all commands including disabled ones.

isBuiltIn.description: True for seeded commands (cannot be deleted, only disabled)

delete.description: Deletes a custom (non-built-in) command. Built-in commands return 409 and must be disabled instead. Custom commands with audit log history are soft-deleted (disabled) to preserve logs. Superadmin only.

post.description: Runs a PowerShell command via SSH. Returns Server-Sent Events stream with real-time output. Role-gated per command. labadmin+ needs active reservation.

get.description: Runs Get-HoloDeckConfig via SSH on the holorouter. For cached results, use /api/holodeck-configs/instances instead.
Detects deployed components. Uses local cache first; falls back to live SSH. Pass ?live=true to force a fresh fetch.

parameters.name: live
parameters.description: Force live SSH fetch instead of cache

get.summary: List all configs with deployment state
get.description: Returns each HoloDeckConfig merged with its BackgroundJob status. Each config has a computed state: not_deployed, deploying, running, completed, or failed.

stale.description: Whether the cache may be outdated

post.description: Launches a Holodeck VCF deployment. labadmin+ with active reservation, or superadmin. Runs Import-HoloDeckConfig to load the selected config, then New-HoloDeckInstance to deploy.

configId.description: HoloDeck config ID — deployment settings resolved from its cached JSON

datastoreName.description: Datastore name for nested VM placement (DeveloperMode)

trunkPortGroupName.description: Trunk port group / virtual network name for Site A (DeveloperMode)

trunkPortGroupNameSiteB.description: Trunk port group for Site B in dual-site deployments (DeveloperMode)

delete.description: Deletes all non-running jobs and cleans up tmux sessions. labadmin+.

get.description: Returns job info and captured tmux output. For completed jobs with saved logs, returns the saved log instead of tmux.

parameters.name: lines
parameters.description: Number of output lines to capture

hasLog.description: True if a saved log file exists

delete.description: Saves tmux output to log file, kills the session, marks job as failed. Superadmin only.

get.description: Returns the saved tmux output log as a downloadable text file. Only available for completed/failed jobs that have a saved log.

post.description: Runs a long-running Day 2 operation (add cluster, nodes, or automation). labadmin+ with active reservation.

get.description: Superadmins see all logs, users see only their own.
Returns categorized links from environment-links.json config.
action=check: combined scan + Broadcom list in a single SSH call (pass version param to filter). action=status: check download tmux session. No action: legacy file listing.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: VCF version to filter components (for action=check)

200.description: Depot scan results or session status

403.description: Forbidden — requires labadmin or superadmin role

post.description: download=start download, kill=cancel download, cleanup-list=find files for a version, cleanup-delete=delete specific files.

cleanupVersion.description: Version to find/delete files for (cleanup actions)

403.description: Forbidden — requires labadmin or superadmin role
